phases.title: Selection store (zustand) + checkbox UI on KanbanCard and IssueCard + select-all/clear
verification: `apps/desktop/src/stores/selectionStore.ts` exports `useSelectionStore` with state `{ selectedByProject: Record<string, Set<number>> }` and actions `toggle`, `selectMany`, `addMany`, `clear`, plus selectors `isSelected`, `count`, `selected`.
Selection store does NOT use `persist` middleware (selection is transient UI state).
`apps/desktop/src/stores/index.ts` re-exports `useSelectionStore`.
`KanbanCard.tsx` renders a checkbox bound to selection store; checkbox handlers call `e.stopPropagation()` on both `onClick` AND `onPointerDown` so neither card click nor drag start fires.
Issues-list card surface (IssueCard.tsx or inline JSX in IssuesSection.tsx — confirm location) renders a similar checkbox bound to the same store.
Selected cards get a visual highlight via `is-batch-selected` class (or equivalent) without conflicting with the existing `selected` class for the detail-store.
`KanbanFilters.tsx` displays `{count} selected` + a Clear button when count > 0.
`pnpm build` clean (tsc -b strict); `pnpm test` count unchanged at 101.
phases.summary: Created `selectionStore.ts` (transient, NOT persisted; per-project Set<number>). Re-exported via `stores/index.ts`. Added checkbox to `KanbanCard.tsx` and `IssueCard.tsx` (sidebar issue list — IssueCard.tsx existed) with `e.stopPropagation()` on both `onClick` and `onPointerDown` (latter prevents `useSortable` drag-start). Added `is-batch-selected` outline class in `kanban.css` and `IssueCard.css` distinct from existing `selected`/`kanban-card--selected`. `KanbanFilters.tsx` shows `{count} selected` + Clear button when count > 0. `pnpm build` clean; tests still 101.

phases.title: Bulk-action toolbar: Close + Add Label backed by gh CLI loops; selection-count badge with Clear
verification: `apps/desktop/src/components/BulkActionToolbar.tsx` exists; renders nothing when selection is empty.
When selection > 0, toolbar shows count, Add label button, Close button (with count badge), Clear button.
Bulk close: `Promise.all(selected.map((n) => invoke('close_github_issue', { number: n, projectPath })))` with per-issue failure tracking; toast on success or partial-failure.

Bulk add label: opens `<LabelPickerPopover>` which fetches labels via `fetch_github_labels`, allows filter input + click-to-pick. Pick fires `edit_github_issue` with `addLabels: [name]` per selected number.
After both actions: `useIssuesStore.getState().triggerRefetch()` fires and the selection clears (close case) or stays (label case — user may want to apply more labels).
Toolbar is mounted at the App root and self-hides via `if (selected.length === 0) return null`.
`pnpm build` clean; test count unchanged (Phase 3 adds tests).
phases.summary: Created `BulkActionToolbar.tsx`, `LabelPickerPopover.tsx`, and `BulkActionToolbar.css`. Mounted `<BulkActionToolbar />` in `App.tsx` after `<ToastContainer />`; self-hides via `if (selected.length === 0) return null`. Bulk close fans out via `Promise.all` of `invoke('close_github_issue', { number, projectPath })`; bulk add-label uses `invoke('edit_github_issue', { number, addLabels: [name], removeLabels: [], projectPath })`. Both call `useIssuesStore.getState().triggerRefetch()`. Toasts use the existing positional `addToast(message, type)` API (NOT object). `pnpm build` clean.

phases.title: Vitest coverage for selectionStore + file follow-up issue for shift+click / bulk YOLO / bulk assign-to-release / bulk remove-label
verification: `apps/desktop/src/stores/__tests__/selectionStore.test.ts` adds 4 vitest cases (toggle add/remove, selectMany replaces, addMany unions, clear empties).
Tests mock `useProjectsStore` so they're hermetic.
`pnpm test` desktop count goes from 101 → 105 (+4).
`pnpm build` clean.
Manual smoke verified per the test plan.

Plan file's Phase 3 summary includes a one-line note that a follow-up issue should be filed by the parent for the deferred scope (shift+click range, bulk remove-label, bulk YOLO, bulk assign-to-release).
phases.summary: Added `selectionStore.test.ts` with 4 hermetic vitest cases (toggle, selectMany, addMany, clear) — `useProjectsStore` mocked at module-level before import. Desktop test count: 101 → 105. `pnpm build` clean. Follow-up scope (shift+click range, bulk remove-label, bulk YOLO, bulk assign-to-release) should be filed as a new issue by the parent agent.
